title: Resume
summary: Comprehensive resume for SUMIT DEVENDRA RATHOD, detailing education, project experience, and skills.

children.title: Education
children.summary: Overview of academic qualifications and achievements.

children.title: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering [AI & ML]
children.summary: Currently pursuing a B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering with a specialization in AI & ML at VIT Pune. Maintaining a strong academic record with a CGPA of 9.06, demonstrating proficiency in core computer science and emerging AI/ML concepts.

children.title: Secondary Education
children.summary: Completed Secondary Education at Abhyasa Secondary School, Amravati. This foundational education provided essential academic skills and a broad knowledge base.

children.title: Experience
children.summary: Details of project development and volunteer work, showcasing practical application of technical skills.

children.title: Project Developer (Fuzzy Logic Name Recognition)
children.summary: Developed a name recognition system utilizing fuzzy logic techniques to effectively manage variations and inconsistencies in user input. Implemented advanced matching algorithms, significantly enhancing text identification accuracy in diverse real-world datasets.

children.title: Project Developer (Facial BMI Estimation)
children.summary: Engineered a facial-analysis-based software designed to estimate Body Mass Index (BMI) from images. This involved leveraging image processing techniques and training machine learning models to achieve predictive BMI estimations.

children.title: Project Developer (AI Disease Detection)
children.summary: Currently developing an AI-based system focused on the early detection of common diseases using image and symptom data. This project aims to facilitate predictive diagnosis, enhancing early intervention capabilities.

children.title: Volunteer at VIT Pune
children.summary: Actively contributed to the successful planning and execution of various sports and cultural fests at VIT Pune. This role significantly enhanced organizational and collaboration skills through practical event management experience.

children.summary: Adept at designing and implementing robust backend logic for various applications, ensuring efficient data processing and system functionality.
